mapper.insert: insert into sky_take_out.user (openid, name, phone, sex, id_number, avatar, create_time) values (#{openid}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{sex}, #{idNumber}, #{avatar}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(id) AS user_count FROM sky_take_out.user WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
select count(id) from sky_take_out.user where create_time <= #{time}
